name: digital-colleague-workspace
description: Provider-neutral workspace workflows for one digital colleague using official Codex connectors.

interface.shortDescription: Safe inbox and calendar workflows across Google and Microsoft.
interface.longDescription: Configure official Gmail or Outlook Email and Google Calendar or Outlook Calendar connectors, then triage mail and prepare calendar briefs with optional Notion and Slack context.
defaultPrompt: Connect my email and calendar providers with read-only checks.
Use $inbox-triage for recent mail and draft next steps.
Use $calendar-brief for today's agenda and preparation.
